hero.title: Your wellness space in the bay of Santanyí
hero.subtitle: Swimming · Gym · Fitness Classes · Padel
hero.description: Two world-class sports facilities in Santanyí and Cala d'Or. Monthly membership from €10 or try our Day Pass.

services.title: Everything you need in one place
services.subtitle: Quality services for the whole family, all year round

swimming.title: Swimming
swimming.desc: Own methodology with 25 courses for all ages and levels. Continuous progress evaluation.

gym.title: Gym & Fitness
gym.desc: Fully equipped gym with personalised routines via the Trainingym app. Cardio, weights and much more.

activities.title: Fitness Classes
activities.desc: Over 20 activities with qualified instructors: aqua-fitness, yoga, pilates, zumba, spinning and many more.

padel.title: Padel
padel.desc: Book a court and join the facility ranking via Playtomic. Regular internal competitions.

personal.title: Personal Training
personal.desc: Personalised training for your goals, injury rehabilitation and specific health programmes.

health.title: Sport & Health
health.desc: Adapted programmes for specific medical conditions. Therapeutic exercise with professionals.

pricing.title: Clear prices, no surprises
pricing.subtitle: From €10/month for residents. No long-term commitment.
pricing.residentNote: Resident prices for Santanyí. Contact us for non-resident rates.

schedule.title: Opening Hours
schedule.subtitle: Open all year, including bank holidays

daypass.title: Day Pass – One-day access
daypass.subtitle: Visiting Santanyí or Cala d'Or? Enjoy our facilities with no commitment.

facilities.title: Two facilities, one experience
facilities.subtitle: Santanyí and Cala d'Or, just minutes apart

santanyi.name: Santanyí Pool
santanyi.desc: 25m indoor pool, fully equipped gym, fitness studio and modern changing rooms.
santanyi.address: Carrer Bernat Vidal i Tomàs, 83, 07650 Santanyí

calaDor.name: Cala d'Or Pool
calaDor.desc: Sports complex in Cala d'Or with pool, modern gym and easy access from the marina.

app.title: Manage your bookings from your phone
app.subtitle: With our PWA app, book activities, check schedules and enter facilities with a QR code.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: We'll answer your questions within 24 hours

form.name: Full name
form.success: Message sent! We'll be in touch soon.
form.error: An error occurred. Please try again or call us.

home.title: Santanyí & Cala d'Or Swimming Pools | Membership from €10/month
home.description: Municipal sports centres in Santanyí and Cala d'Or, Mallorca. Swimming, gym, fitness classes and padel. Membership from €10/month or Day Pass. Open all year.

swimming.description: Swimming courses for adults and children in Santanyí and Cala d'Or, Mallorca.

gym.description: Municipal gym in Santanyí with personalised routines via app.

padel.title: Padel Santanyí | Book via Playtomic
padel.description: Padel courts in Santanyí. Online booking via Playtomic.

prices.description: Membership rates, courses and day pass at Santanyí and Cala d'Or sports centres.

schedule.title: Opening Hours Santanyí & Cala d'Or Pools
schedule.description: Opening hours: Mon-Fri 7-22h, Sat 8-21h, Sun 9-14h. Open all year.

santanyi.title: Santanyí Municipal Pool | Sports Centre
santanyi.description: 25m indoor pool, gym and activities in the centre of Santanyí, Mallorca.
